MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-27-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-27-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM RFAS ADMITTTED, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DATED APRIL 28, 2020 ADMITTED IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT REQUEST MONETARY SANCTIONS AND NONE ARE AWARDED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE A COPY OF THE ORDER HEREIN ON DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WITH THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT A. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVE STEIN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2021 Set For Case Management Conference On May-05-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted without leave to amend based on defendant's admissions. Judgment to be entered in plaintiff's favor forthwith.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Rfas Admittted
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Motion To Deem Rfas Admittted (Noticed In Law & Motion Dept; To Be Heard In Discovery Dept.)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Motion To Deem RFAs Admittted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion to deem Requests for Admissions dated April 28, 2020 admitted is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff does not request monetary sanctions and none are awarded. Plaintiff shall serve a copy of the Order herein on defendant's counsel with the Request for Admissions attached as Exhibit A.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2020 Set For Trial On Feb-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
